chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-2403 of 2O11 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag 'A' 2. For orders on CMA No.B256/2011 3. Fororders on CMA No.16246/2011 4. For hearing of main case Mr. Kamran Mobeen Khan, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Assistant Advocate General Through instant petition, the petitioners claiming to be the legal heirs of late Niaz Muhammad claim possession of subject property bearing CS No.453 (1 130 Sq.Yds),454 (30 Sd.Yds),455(30 Sq.yds) situated at Wallace Road Sukkur by virtue of Provisional Transfer Deed seek directions to respondents for issuance of PTD / Final Transfer Order in respect of said property. As per the comments filed by respondent No.2, the property does not own by the petitioners. Stnce the very title of the petitioners rn respect of the subject property is disputed, this petition is dismissed leaving the petitioners to avail their remedy under usual mode of proceedings in accordance with law. JUD ) 16-11-2022 h ftL
